scripts.test:renderer-logic: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force D:\tmp\ai8888-renderer-test -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; tsc --target ES2020 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --skipLibCheck --strict --outDir D:\tmp\ai8888-renderer-test src/subscription.ts tests/subscription.test.ts; node D:\tmp\ai8888-renderer-test\tests\subscription.test.js"
scripts.test: npm run test:renderer-logic && cargo test -q --manifest-path src-tauri\Cargo.toml
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && cargo check -q --manifest-path src-tauri\Cargo.toml
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run check && npm run build:renderer
